name: nvidia-nccl-cu12

metadata.name: nvidia-nccl-cu12
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for nvidia-nccl-cu12==2.23.4

documentation: NCCL (pronounced "Nickel") is a stand-alone library of standard collective communication routines for GPUs, implementing all-reduce, all-gather, reduce, broadcast, and reduce-scatter. It has been optimized to achieve high bandwidth on any platform using PCIe, NVLink, NVswitch, as well as networking using InfiniBand Verbs or TCP/IP sockets.
